original_image_tags: A handwritten note on a small piece of aged, off-white paper. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top. The handwriting is in blue ink, cursive script.

elements.description: A stamped phrase 'ANONYMOUS COMUNICATION KEEP ENVELOP ATTACHED' at the top left, and a stamped 'G.I.R.' at the top right. The rest of the page consists of handwritten text in blue ink.

judge.reason: The descriptions are of completely different visual content: A describes a handwritten note with hole-punch marks, while B describes a stamped and handwritten page with specific stamp text.
